name: Lenovo ThinkVision P49w-30 49" IPS WLED Ultra-Wide Monitor - 5120x1440 - HDR10 - 2x HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - 2x Thunderbolt 4 (In/Out) - USB Hub - eKVM/KVM Switch - RJ45 Ethernet - MC60 Webcam & Integrated Mic - Built-in 5W Speakers (63DBZAR1US)
